commands.review_summary:
The PR makes local-model lean runs default unset Tool Search config to structured Tool Search controls, threads that effective config through the embedded runner, and updates focused tests and docs.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +82, Docs +2. Total +119 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main only enables Tool Search from explicit tools.toolSearch config, while this PR injects defaults for localModelLean. I did not run a live Ollama/provider reproduction.

target.title: fix(agents): compact lean local tool catalogs
target.body:
## Summary

- Defaults `localModelLean` runs to structured Tool Search controls when `tools.toolSearch` is not explicitly configured.
- Preserves explicit operator Tool Search config, including `tools.toolSearch: false` opt-out.
- Threads the lean effective config into embedded runner Tool Search setup and documents the behavior for local model/Ollama users.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts` 122 tests passed on final pushed SHA `b157fb008c`.
- `node scripts/docs-list.js` completed successfully for docs routing.
- AWS Crabbox provider `aws`, lease `cbx_83ef466e4a57`, run `run_45895da73338`: `pnpm check:changed` passed on final pushed SHA `b157fb008c`.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean: no accepted/actionable findings.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: local-model lean runs now compact larger tool catalogs behind structured Tool Search controls by default, reducing prompt/tool schema pressure for smaller models while preserving explicit operator config.

Real environment tested: local macOS node-wrapper Vitest; AWS Crabbox Linux c7a.8xlarge changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`; AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` in run `run_45895da73338`.

Evidence after fix: focused test run passed 122 tests on `b157fb008c`; Crabbox changed gate passed with exit 0 on `b157fb008c`.

Observed result after fix: lean mode injects `{ enabled: true, mode: "tools", searchDefaultLimit: 5, maxSearchLimit: 10 }` only when Tool Search is unset; explicit `tools.toolSearch` config remains untouched.

What was not tested: no live Ollama/provider turn in this PR; this PR proves runner/config behavior and the changed gate, while live small-model matrix coverage remains in the broader small-model PR stack.
target.author: vincentkoc
